families.expected_behavior: Retained destination delivery remains bounded under same-host execution, with replay/verify/governance visibility and rough local latency bands.
acceptable_bounded_patterns: bounded receipt and usage growth per case
failure_kind and retryability stay within shared delivery vocabulary
rough latency stays in local-band rather than headline throughput claim
families.why_family_matters: Delivery is the retained operator-facing boundary between work execution and destination-side failure/replay handling.

families.expected_behavior: Queue state transitions remain inspectable and bounded, with spool/sqlite differences explicit and provenance/governance growth staying case-scoped.
families.why_family_matters: Queue/governance defines the retained same-host recovery envelope and operator trust surface.

families.expected_behavior: Retained source contract, usage, provenance, governance, and checkpoint isolation remain aligned under bounded local execution.
acceptable_bounded_patterns: bounded usage and governance growth per source case
checkpoint/progress stays isolated to case scope
unacceptable_drift: governance linkage no longer explaining source behavior
families.why_family_matters: Source-deep behavior is the retained proof that source identity and progress semantics remain local, bounded, and inspectable.

families.expected_behavior: Fanout remains a composition/orchestration surface with bounded child and aggregate output growth plus stable shared-summary behavior.
acceptable_bounded_patterns: bounded child and aggregate artifact growth
shared summary remains stable when failed children agree
families.why_family_matters: Fanout is the retained composition envelope and must stay operationally clear without flattening into sink semantics.

families.expected_behavior: Filesystem remains the lowest-cost control anchor for bounded artifact growth, output shape, and cleanup-overhead interpretation.
acceptable_bounded_patterns: rough latency remains low-cost and local
unacceptable_drift: cleanup dependence on hidden manual actions
families.why_family_matters: Filesystem provides the control profile for interpreting whether other family growth is genuinely bounded or merely hidden by environment noise.
